text:
(18) Other Information:
List of material contracts and inspection of documents for inspection:
sentence_window:
(16) Any other material disclosures, as deemed necessary. (17) In case of a fast track issue, the disclosures specified in this Part, which have been
indicated in Part B, need not be made. (18) Other Information:
List of material contracts and inspection of documents for inspection: (1) Material contracts. (2) Material Documents
(3) Time and place at which the contracts, together with documents, will be
available for inspection from the date of the offer document until the date of
closing of the subscription list.
